cms.task_text: Naprogramujte želvu, aby nakreslila [hlp]rám obrazu[/hlp] — obdélník [hlp]100 × 80 pixelů[/hlp]. [hlp]Horní a levá[/hlp] strana mají [hlp]tloušťku 5[/hlp], [hlp]dolní a pravá[/hlp] strana mají [hlp]tloušťku 1[/hlp]. Tloušťku nastavte před každou dvojicí stran.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_set_pen_width" x="30" y="30"><field name="WIDTH">5</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" x="120" y="30"><field name="DISTANCE">100</field></block><block type="turtle_right" x="210" y="30"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" x="30" y="110"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block><block type="turtle_right" x="120" y="110"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_set_pen_width" x="210" y="110"><field name="WIDTH">1</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" x="30" y="190"><field name="DISTANCE">100</field></block><block type="turtle_right" x="120" y="190"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" x="210" y="190"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_set_pen_width" x="50" y="50"><field name="WIDTH">5</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">100</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_set_pen_width"><field name="WIDTH">1</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">100</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
